attack_1_degeneracy.verdict: PARTIALLY DEGENERATE. Alt invariants (rank->regulator) get 85% of the signal. The geometry is not unique to torsion/class_number — rank/regulator also work, just weaker. The structure is in the SPACE, not in the specific invariants.

attack_2_basis_rotation.verdict: ROTATION INVARIANT. Every rotation of the M-A plane gives IDENTICAL transfer (std=0.0). The geometry has NO preferred basis in the Megethos-Arithmos plane. This is gauge freedom — the structure is rotationally symmetric.

attack_3_adversarial_injection.verdict: BORDERLINE REJECTION. Fake domain gets rho=-0.10 (near zero but not exactly zero). System mostly rejects random structure but not perfectly.

attack_4_causality.verdict: CONFIRMED DIRECTIONAL. 2.36x forward/reverse asymmetry. Information flows from EC to NF, not the reverse. This is consistent with EC being a richer projection.

attack_5_compression.verdict: Z2 ALONE (Arithmos) is the BEST single predictor (rho=0.61, BETTER than the full 5D space!). Adding Z1 (Megethos) slightly hurts. The transfer is PURELY Arithmos-driven. Megethos contributes nothing to cross-domain prediction of arithmetic structure.
